prose: The frontier orbitals task on benzene was performed using DFT at the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set in the gas phase. The HOMO energy is -7.04683 eV, the LUMO energy is -0.41575 eV, resulting in a HOMO-LUMO gap of approximately 6.63109 eV. The calculation converged after 8 SCF cycles, and all outputs are from chemkit. The result is considered trustworthy.
